name: Enhanced Text Fields
description: Enhances REDCap text fields with JSON and Markdown editing, validation, formatting, and preview tools.

authors.name: Günther Rezniczek
authors.institution: St. Elisabethgruppe GmbH - Marien Hospital Herne | Klinikum der Ruhr-Universität Bochum

action-tags.description: Plain text editor for Notes fields. Params: initial, height, text-only. See documentation.
JSON editor for text/Notes fields. Params: initial, height, format, indent, json-only. See documentation.
Markdown editor and HTML preview for Notes fields. Params: initial, height, md-only. See documentation.
CSS editor for text/Notes fields. Params: initial, height, format, indent, css-only. See documentation.
INI editor for Notes fields. Params: initial, height, ini-only. See documentation.
R editor for Notes fields. Params: initial, height, r-only. See documentation.
XML editor for text/Notes fields. Params: initial, height, format, indent, xml-only. See documentation.
YAML editor for Notes fields. Params: initial, height, yaml-only. See documentation.

project-settings.name: Output debug information to the browser console
